description_long: This is a modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large, flat, rectangular display framed by a thin, light-colored bezel. The screen sits atop a sleek, metallic pedestal stand with a rectangular base, and is accompanied by a matching wireless keyboard and mouse. The rear of the monitor features a smooth, matte finish in a teal blue color, with a prominent Apple logo centered on the back panel. The stand has a cable management slot and is constructed from metal, providing stability and a minimalist aesthetic. The overall design is slim and contemporary, with rounded corners and a seamless integration of components. No visible buttons or ports are present on the front or sides, maintaining a clean and uncluttered appearance.
description: A slim, modern all-in-one desktop computer with a large display, metallic stand, and matching wireless keyboard and mouse. The rear is teal blue with a prominent Apple logo and a minimalist, seamless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display with a thin bezel, wireless keyboard, and mouse arranged neatly in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the monitor and the flat, rectangular metallic stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the teal blue back panel, centered Apple logo, and the stand's cable management slot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the slimness of the monitor and the alignment of the keyboard and mouse.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, light-colored, and has rounded corners, with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visual distraction.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular pedestal stand made of metallic material, with a flat base and integrated cable management slot; no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons are visible on the front, sides, or stand; any controls are likely integrated or touch-sensitive.
attribute_brand_logo: A large, white Apple logo is centered on the rear panel of the monitor, standing out against the teal blue background.
